endpoints.when: fact extraction if MLX is running locally
fact extraction if Ollama is running locally
fact extraction only if user sets OPENCLAW_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY
endpoints.note: User-configurable via llmEndpoint config. Disabled by default if no API key set.

shellExecution.purpose: All shell commands execute sqlite3 for local database read/write. No arbitrary command execution.

shellExecution2.purpose: QMD CLI for vector search and collection management

fileAccess.purpose: Local memory database and markdown file storage

localOnly: All search and storage operations (5 engines) run entirely on-device
File reads (sqlite3, markdown) never leave the machine
Shell execution (sqlite3, qmd) operates only on local databases
remote: License verification: sends only {key, device_id} to openclaw-api.apptah.com
LLM fact extraction: sends conversation excerpts to user-configured endpoint (local or cloud)
neverTransmitted: Raw memory content is never sent to apptah.com servers
No telemetry, analytics, or usage tracking

envVars.name: OPENCLAW_LLM_API_KEY
envVars.purpose: API key for cloud LLM fact extraction (optional)

envVars.name: OPENCLAW_LCM_DB
envVars.purpose: Override path to lossless compression database (local only)

envVars.name: OPENCLAW_ROUTER_CONFIG
envVars.purpose: Override path to router config (local only)

envVars.name: OPENCLAW_BACKENDS_JSON
envVars.purpose: Override path to backends config (local only)

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories before each agent turn

autoCapture.label: Auto Capture
autoCapture.help: Store conversation context after each turn

maxRecallTokens.label: Recall Token Budget
maxRecallTokens.help: Maximum tokens used for injected memories per turn

autoRecallTier.label: Auto-Recall Tier
autoRecallTier.help: L0 (~100 tokens), L1 (~800 tokens), L2 (~2000 tokens, full content)

toolResponseTier.label: Search Response Tier
toolResponseTier.help: L1 (summary) or L2 (full content). Use --full suffix for one-off L2.

qmdCollection.label: QMD Collection
qmdCollection.help: QMD collection name for scoped search. Auto-detected from .openclaw-memory.json if empty.

qmdProbeQuery.label: QMD Probe Query
qmdProbeQuery.help: Fixed query for runtime probe. Required to enable vsearch/query modes.
